$comment: FC16 D-CSUBSET-ANON-MEMBER-PROMOTION (C11/C23 §6.7.2.1 ¶13): an anonymous UNION member's fields (a, b) are promoted into the enclosing struct's member namespace and SHARE storage. s.a=41 then s.b=s.b+1 aliases the same slot -> s.a becomes 42. Without promotion s.a/s.b are undeclared (S0017); without aliasing s.a stays 41. Runs on all four targets + the shipped release pipeline.
